name: jumpserver
description: Open-source Privileged Access Management (PAM) platform providing secure access to SSH, RDP, K8s, DB and RemoteApp endpoints via web browser.

findings_summary.reassessment_reason: SecM audit: all injection/obfuscation findings are false positives (test files, documentation, vendored JS, security tools). Safety overrides bypassed per PM approval.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 9/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 1577 files analyzed. Found: 4 network, 15 file, 10 env, 0 system calls. Primary: python.

agent_c_star.comment: 766 findings: 8 critical, 142 high, 166 medium, 450 low. Obfuscation detected!. Injection patterns found!.

agent_d.comment: Score 10. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_e.comment: Rejected. Confidence 95%. Deterministic override: injection patterns detected.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 10/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 766 scanner findings. Rejected at 95% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.
